content: The phone just connected. The agent is greeting you.
Hi there! I'm calling to find out your office hours — are you open on Saturdays by any chance?
The agent said: For quality and training purposes.
Oh sure, that's fine with me. So, do you have Saturday hours available?
The agent said: Point Orthopedics part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Sarah?
No, this is Linda Thompson calling. Can you tell me if you're open on Saturdays and what your address is?
The agent said: Pinnacle Orthopedics is not open on Saturdays. Our clinic hours are Monday through Friday. Would you like the full address for the clinic?
Yes, please give me the address. And do you have a second location closer to Palo Alto? Also, what's the parking like there?
The agent said: The clinic address is 1. 1234 recovery way.
Got it, 1234 Recovery Way. Is there a location closer to Palo Alto, and how's the parking situation?
The agent said: 787 there is free patient parking available in the surface lot in front of the building.
Great, thank you! So just to confirm — do you have another location closer to Palo Alto, or is that the only one?
The agent said: We only have the Austin location at 1234 recovery. Way, Suite, 200.
Perfect, thank you so much for the information. Have a good day!
The agent said: Closer to glad I could help. Let me know if you have any other questions.
I will, thanks again! Bye now.
